name: Quelites (Spinach with Beans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince the onion and set aside.
2. Heat bacon drippings in a skillet over medium heat. Add chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 3-5 minutes.
3. Stir in prepared pinto beans, chili seeds, and salt. Cook for another 5 minutes.
4. Add cooked fresh spinach to the mixture and stir gently until combined. Simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Garnish with sliced boiled egg and serve immediately.
